diff: This document contains a Directory of all prospective Instances of the Pioneer Chain Primitive whose Invocation is currently in progress. Invocations that are completed successfully are moved to [A.6.1.1.8.2.5.3.1.2 - Active Instances Directory](37c0dfc8-6bb3-4936-840f-08e15d8d13ec), whereas failed Invocations are Archived in [A.6.1.1.8.2.5.3.1.5 - Hub Data Repository](fae1a000-81c8-4a7f-a99e-3f1fccb25366).

This document contains a Directory of all prospective Instances of the Pioneer Chain Primitive whose Invocation is currently in progress. Invocations that are completed successfully are moved to [A.6.1.1.8.2.5.3.1.2 - Active Instances Directory](37c0dfc8-6bb3-4936-840f-08e15d8d13ec), whereas failed Invocations are Archived in [A.6.1.1.8.2.5.3.1.5 - Hub Data Repository](fae1a000-81c8-4a7f-a99e-3f1fccb25366).
